rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>Unbelievable!<unk[5:0]> It's such a long way here,<unk[5:0]>
but you're barely dressed for such
a journey!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>You came all the way here...<unk[5:0]>dressed
like that?<unk[5:0]> Aren't you cold?

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>Look at you...<unk[5:0]> Dressed to keep nice and
warm, it seems.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>如你所见，这一带刮着猛烈的暴风雪……<unk[5:0]>
不穿<Color=red>耐寒的衣服<Color=white>，会渐渐失去体力。
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>不过，我也没有
可以抵御寒冷的衣服……
所以才这样躲在驿站里避难。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>如你所見，這附近正在下暴風雪……<unk[5:0]>
要是不穿上<Color=red>耐寒衣物<Color=white>，體力將會流失喔。
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>話雖如此，
我也沒帶防寒的衣服……
所以現在才會在驛站避難。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>この<Ruby={2:4}あた>辺りは <Ruby={2:2}み>見ての<Ruby={2:4}とお>通り<Ruby={6:10}もうふぶき>猛吹雪…<unk[5:0]>
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}さむ>寒さに<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強い<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}き>着ないと <Ruby={4:10}たいりょく>体力を<Ruby={2:4}うば>奪われちゃうよ
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>かくいう<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私も <Ruby={2:4}さむ>寒さをしのげる<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服は
<Ruby={2:2}も>持ち<Ruby={2:2}あ>合わせてなくってね…
こうして<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿に <Ruby={4:6}ひなん>避難させてもらってるところさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>The blizzard outside is furious, isn't it?<unk[5:0]>
This weather can be life-threatening to
those without <Color=red>cold-resistant clothes<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>While my fashion is perfect for nearly
every scenario, sadly, a raging blizzard
isn't one of them. So I'm stuck here.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>如果你要去西边的<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
应该能买到填满羽毛的防寒服……
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>不过，听说通往村庄的桥塌了，<unk[5:0]>
也许现在去也是白跑一趟。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>只要去西邊的<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
應該就能買到塞滿羽毛的防寒服……
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>但是據說通往村子的橋樑斷了，<unk[5:0]>
就算過去可能也會白跑一趟呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><Ruby={2:4}にし>西にある <Color=red>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}い>行けば
<Ruby={4:6}うもう>羽毛がつまった<Ruby={6:10}ぼうかんぎ>防寒着が <Ruby={2:2}か>買えるはずだけど…
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={2:4}つう>通じる <Ruby={2:4}はし>橋が<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてるってウワサだし<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}い>行っても <Ruby={6:8}むだあし>無駄足になるかもしれないね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]>You can buy cold-resistant clothing at
<Color=red>Rito Village<Color=white> off to the west. Clothes that
are stuffed with feathers, I've heard.
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>But they say that the bridge that crosses
over to their village has collapsed. So
a journey there could prove fruitless.
